Parameters.//sql-password: REMOVED. There is no sql-password parameter any more: AddSqlServer generates a random administrator password and persists it to user secrets. A committed 'DEV-ONLY' password is still a committed password, and this file is the first place a reader looks. Nothing below is a credential — they are demo levers.
Parameters.//failure-injection: The demo levers (Prompt H3). Defaults are the happy path. Change one, restart the AppHost, and a specific row of the failure matrix fires. Nothing in the services needs editing.
Parameters.//payment-decline-all: true declines every charge, whatever the amount.
Parameters.//notification-provider-down: true makes every notification fail, and be dropped.
Parameters.//notification-provider-hangs: true makes every notification hang, proving the send timeout.
